data.description:
How can I change the preferred network type with ADB?

Example: set Use only GSM, use only WCDMA, use only LTE or automatic.

https://stackoverflow.com/feeds/question.title: Feed for question 'how to change preferred network type over adb android?'

#onetrust-banner-sdk {
  background: var(--blue-100, #f0f4ff) !important;
  width: 410px !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - 32px) !important;
  padding: 24px !important;
  border-radius: 0px !important;
  left: 16px !important;
  right: 16px !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk * {
  color: var(--black-600, #211d1e) !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-container {
    position: initial !important;
}

/* Header - not used */
#onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Shadow */
#onetrust-banner-sdk.otFloatingRoundedCorner {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 4px 13px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.13),
    0 3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.09),
    0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.09) !important;
}

/* Typography */
#onetrust-banner-sdk * {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto,
    "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji",
    "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji" !important;
}

/* Policy */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy,
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-wo-title #onetrust-group-container {
  margin-top: 0px !important;
}

/* Links */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] {
    color: var(--black-500, #3B4045);
    text-decoration: underline;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href]:hover {
    color: var(--blue-500, #5076f2);
    text-decoration: underline;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-title {
  padding: 0 0 4px 0 !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 8px !important;
  line-height: 1.30769231 !important;
}

/* Buttons */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group-parent {
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: start !important;
  gap: 4px;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
}


#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
  flex: 0 1 auto;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  font-weight: bold !important;
  border-radius: 1000px !important;
  padding: 6px 12px !important;
  letter-spacing: normal !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 1px solid transparent !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  line-height: 1.15 !important;
  width: auto !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.08) !important;
  color: var(--black-600, #201C1D) !important;
  border-color: transparent !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-pc-btn-handler:hover {
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.15) !important;
}


#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler {
 background-color: var(--black-600, #201c1d) !important;
  color: var(--white, #ffffff) !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-reject-all-handler {
  background-color: var(--black-600, #201c1d) !important;
  color: var(--white, #FFFFFF) !important;
}

/* Close button */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
  top: 0px !important;
  right: 0px  !important;
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  #onetrust-banner-sdk {
    padding: 16px !important;
    bottom: 16px !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    background-image: none !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group .banner-actions-container button {
    margin: 8px 0 0 0 !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
    display: block !important;
  }
  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-top: 8px !important;
  }

    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
<p>This is working for my devices:</p>

<pre class="default s-code-block"><div class="mtn4 d-flex jc-end ps-sticky l0 mrn4" data-nosnippet=""><button class="py2 mb2 s-btn s-btn__muted s-btn__xs fs-caption ff-sans d-flex ai-center js-copy-button fc-black-400 h:fc-black-500 f:bg-black-200" type="button"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-icon iconCopy mr4" width="17" height="18" viewBox="0 0 17 18"><path d="M5 6c0-1.09.91-2 2-2h4.5L15 7.5V15c0 1.09-.91 2-2 2H7c-1.09 0-2-.91-2-2zm6-1.25V8h3.25z"></path><path d="M10 1a2 2 0 0 1 2 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v9a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a3 3 0 0 1 3-3z" opacity=".4"></path></svg>Copy</button></div><code data-highlighted="yes" class="hljs language-haskell"><span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell sqlite3 /<span class="hljs-class"><span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/<span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/com.android.providers.settings/databases/settings.db "update global <span class="hljs-type">SET</span> value = 1 <span class="hljs-type">WHERE</span> name = 'preferred_network_mode'"</span>
<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell sqlite3 /<span class="hljs-class"><span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/<span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/com.android.providers.settings/databases/settings.db "select value <span class="hljs-type">FROM</span> secure <span class="hljs-type">WHERE</span> name = 'preferred_network_mode'"</span>
<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell settings put global airplane_mode_on <span class="hljs-number">1</span>
<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.<span class="hljs-type">AIRPLANE_MODE</span> <span class="hljs-comment">--ez state true</span>
<span class="hljs-title">sleep</span> <span class="hljs-number">5</span>;
<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell settings put global airplane_mode_on <span class="hljs-number">0</span>
<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.<span class="hljs-type">AIRPLANE_MODE</span> <span class="hljs-comment">--ez state false</span>
</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
<p>ADB command to set RAT:</p>
<p>**adb shell settings put global preferred_network_mode1 2  --> WCDMA on SUB1</p>
<p>adb shell settings put global preferred_network_mode2 1  --> GSM on SUB2</p>
<p>adb shell stop ril-daemon</p>
<p>adb shell start ril-daemon</p>
<p>adb shell settings put global airplane_mode_on 1</p>
<p>adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.AIRPLANE_MODE --ez state true</p>
<p>sleep 5;</p>
<p>adb shell settings put global airplane_mode_on 0</p>
<p>adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.AIRPLANE_MODE --ez state false**</p>
<p>RIL_PreferredNetworkType:</p>
<pre class="default s-code-block"><div class="mtn4 d-flex jc-end ps-sticky l0 mrn4" data-nosnippet=""><button class="py2 mb2 s-btn s-btn__muted s-btn__xs fs-caption ff-sans d-flex ai-center js-copy-button fc-black-400 h:fc-black-500 f:bg-black-200" type="button"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-icon iconCopy mr4" width="17" height="18" viewBox="0 0 17 18"><path d="M5 6c0-1.09.91-2 2-2h4.5L15 7.5V15c0 1.09-.91 2-2 2H7c-1.09 0-2-.91-2-2zm6-1.25V8h3.25z"></path><path d="M10 1a2 2 0 0 1 2 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v9a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a3 3 0 0 1 3-3z" opacity=".4"></path></svg>Copy</button></div><code data-highlighted="yes" class="hljs language-ini"><span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_GSM_WCDMA</span>                = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, /* GSM/WCDMA (WCDMA preferred) */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_GSM_ONLY</span>                 = <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, /* GSM <span class="hljs-literal">on</span>ly */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_WCDMA</span>                    = <span class="hljs-number">2</span>, /* WCDMA  */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_GSM_WCDMA_AUTO</span>           = <span class="hljs-number">3</span>, /* GSM/WCDMA (auto mode, according to PRL) */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_CDMA_EVDO_AUTO</span>           = <span class="hljs-number">4</span>, /* CDMA and EvDo (auto mode, according to PRL) */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_CDMA_ONLY</span>                = <span class="hljs-number">5</span>, /* CDMA <span class="hljs-literal">on</span>ly */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_EVDO_ONLY</span>                = <span class="hljs-number">6</span>, /* EvDo <span class="hljs-literal">on</span>ly */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_GSM_WCDMA_CDMA_EVDO_AUTO</span> = <span class="hljs-number">7</span>, /* GSM/WCDMA, CDMA, and EvDo (auto mode, according to PRL) */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_LTE_CDMA_EVDO</span>            = <span class="hljs-number">8</span>, /* LTE, CDMA and EvDo */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_LTE_GSM_WCDMA</span>            = <span class="hljs-number">9</span>, /* LTE, GSM/WCDMA */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_LTE_CMDA_EVDO_GSM_WCDMA</span>  = <span class="hljs-number">10</span>, /* LTE, CDMA, EvDo, GSM/WCDMA */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_LTE_ONLY</span>                 = <span class="hljs-number">11</span>, /* LTE <span class="hljs-literal">on</span>ly */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_LTE_WCDMA</span>                = <span class="hljs-number">12</span>,  /* LTE/WCDMA */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_ONLY</span>            = <span class="hljs-number">13</span>, /* TD-SCDMA <span class="hljs-literal">on</span>ly */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_WCDMA</span>           = <span class="hljs-number">14</span>, /* TD-SCDMA and WCDMA */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_LTE</span>             = <span class="hljs-number">15</span>, /* TD-SCDMA and LTE */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_GSM</span>             = <span class="hljs-number">16</span>, /* TD-SCDMA and GSM */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_GSM_LTE</span>         = <span class="hljs-number">17</span>, /* TD-SCDMA,GSM and LTE */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_GSM_WCDMA</span>       = <span class="hljs-number">18</span>, /* TD-SCDMA, GSM/WCDMA */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_WCDMA_LTE</span>       = <span class="hljs-number">19</span>, /* TD-SCDMA, WCDMA and LTE */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_GSM_WCDMA_LTE</span>   = <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, /* TD-SCDMA, GSM/WCDMA and LTE */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_GSM_WCDMA_CDMA_EVDO_AUTO</span>  = <span class="hljs-number">21</span>, /* TD-SCDMA, GSM/WCDMA, CDMA and EvDo */
<span class="hljs-attr">PREF_NET_TYPE_TD_SCDMA_LTE_CDMA_EVDO_GSM_WCDMA</span>   = <span class="hljs-number">22</span>  /* TD-SCDMA, LTE, CDMA, EvDo GSM/WCDMA */
</code></pre>

    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
<p>I hope this helps:</p>

<p>GSM Only:</p>

<pre class="default s-code-block"><div class="mtn4 d-flex jc-end ps-sticky l0 mrn4" data-nosnippet=""><button class="py2 mb2 s-btn s-btn__muted s-btn__xs fs-caption ff-sans d-flex ai-center js-copy-button fc-black-400 h:fc-black-500 f:bg-black-200" type="button"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-icon iconCopy mr4" width="17" height="18" viewBox="0 0 17 18"><path d="M5 6c0-1.09.91-2 2-2h4.5L15 7.5V15c0 1.09-.91 2-2 2H7c-1.09 0-2-.91-2-2zm6-1.25V8h3.25z"></path><path d="M10 1a2 2 0 0 1 2 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v9a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a3 3 0 0 1 3-3z" opacity=".4"></path></svg>Copy</button></div><code data-highlighted="yes" class="hljs language-haskell"><span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell sqlite3 /<span class="hljs-class"><span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/<span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/com.android.providers.settings/databases/settings.db "update global <span class="hljs-type">SET</span> value=1 <span class="hljs-type">WHERE</span> name='preferred_network_mode'"</span>

<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> shell sqlite3 /<span class="hljs-class"><span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/<span class="hljs-keyword">data</span>/com.android.providers.settings/databases/settings.db "select value <span class="hljs-type">FROM</span> secure <span class="hljs-type">WHERE</span> name='preferred_network_mode'"</span>

<span class="hljs-title">adb</span> reboot
</code></pre>

<p>For LTE, change <strong>value=11</strong>
For WCDMA, change <strong>value=2</strong></p>

Example: set Use only GSM, use only WCDMA, use only LTE or automatic.
